Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Admissions And Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel From Defendant Snavely Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Admissions And Responses To Plaintiff's First Set Of Special Interrogatories; And For Award of Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's motion is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Snavely's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Snavely in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff to submit proposed order on or before August 21, 2009. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. NOT REPORTED (RBU/612)
